name: Rhys Fletcher | Alt
description:
| OC | Modern Fantasy | Werewolf | Slightly NSFW Intro
**'Balls? What kind, babe?’**
——
Rhys has always had a little more animal instinct in him than most werewolves he's known. This time he's finally all alone with his partner. No roomies! They can do whatever they want: order pizza, play games, turn on some music... and they *don't have to be quiet.*
——
*First night alone with your puppy coded werewolf boyfriend.*
----
*Requested by Anon*
